Prefect Karukia:
I am glad that you accepted this challenge. First, you will need to drink this. We call this drink High Orcs' Mystic Wine. Our shamans drink it during rituals to enhance their innate abilities.
And even if you don't have any such abilities, this wine will let you enter the spirit world for a short time.
You will have to drink it to meet the Totem Spirits. There is one thing that is bothering me, though...
